# dockercompose_stack (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Project name for the Docker Compose stack. Used as the -p flag.
- `service` (Block List, Min: 1) Service definitions. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--service))

### Optional

- `config` (Block List) Config definitions (Docker configs). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--config))
- `network` (Block List) Network definitions. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--network))
- `remove_volumes_on_destroy` (Boolean) Whether to remove named volumes on destroy (docker compose down -v).
- `secret` (Block List) Secret definitions (Docker secrets). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--secret))
- `volume` (Block List) Volume definitions. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--volume))
- `working_dir` (String) Working directory for the stack. If not set, uses <project_directory>/<name>/.

### Read-Only

- `compose_file_path` (String) Path to the generated docker-compose.yml file.
- `compose_yaml` (String) The generated docker-compose YAML content.
- `container` (List of Object) Runtime information about containers in the stack (populated after apply). Sorted by service name. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--container))
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

<a id="nestedblock--service"></a>
### Nested Schema for `service`

Required:

- `image` (String) Docker image.
- `name` (String) Service name.

Optional:

- `cap_add` (List of String) Add Linux capabilities.
- `cap_drop` (List of String) Drop Linux capabilities.
- `command` (List of String) Override default command.
- `container_name` (String) Custom container name.
- `cpus` (String) CPU limit (legacy, prefer resource_limits_cpus).
- `depends_on` (List of String) Service dependencies.
- `devices` (List of String) Device mappings.
- `dns` (List of String) Custom DNS servers.
- `domainname` (String) Container domain name.
- `entrypoint` (List of String) Override default entrypoint.
- `env_file` (List of String) Env file paths.
- `environment` (Map of String) Environment variables.
- `expose` (List of String) Expose ports without publishing to host.
- `extra_hosts` (List of String) Extra /etc/hosts entries (hostname:ip).
- `healthcheck_disable` (Boolean) Disable healthcheck.
- `healthcheck_interval` (String) Healthcheck interval (e.g. '30s').
- `healthcheck_retries` (Number) Healthcheck max retries.
- `healthcheck_start_period` (String) Healthcheck start period.
- `healthcheck_test` (List of String) Healthcheck command (e.g. ['CMD', 'curl', '-f', 'http://localhost']).
- `healthcheck_timeout` (String) Healthcheck timeout.
- `hostname` (String) Container hostname.
- `init` (Boolean) Run init process inside the container.
- `ipc` (String) IPC mode.
- `labels` (Map of String) Container labels.
- `logging_driver` (String) Logging driver (json-file, syslog, etc.).
- `logging_options` (Map of String) Logging driver options.
- `mem_limit` (String) Memory limit (legacy, prefer resource_limits_memory).
- `mem_reservation` (String) Memory reservation (legacy).
- `network_mode` (String) Network mode (bridge, host, none, service:name).
- `networks` (List of String) Networks to attach to.
- `pid` (String) PID mode.
- `platform` (String) Target platform (e.g. linux/amd64).
- `ports` (List of String) Port mappings (host:container).
- `privileged` (Boolean) Run in privileged mode.
- `profiles` (List of String) Profiles this service belongs to.
- `pull_policy` (String) Image pull policy (always, never, missing, build).
- `read_only` (Boolean) Mount root filesystem as read-only.
- `replicas` (Number) Number of container replicas.
- `resource_limits_cpus` (String) CPU limit (e.g. '0.5').
- `resource_limits_memory` (String) Memory limit (e.g. '512M').
- `resource_reservations_cpus` (String) CPU reservation.
- `resource_reservations_memory` (String) Memory reservation.
- `restart` (String) Restart policy: no, always, on-failure, unless-stopped.
- `runtime` (String) Runtime (e.g. runc, nvidia).
- `security_opt` (List of String) Security options.
- `shm_size` (String) Size of /dev/shm.
- `stdin_open` (Boolean) Keep stdin open (docker run -i).
- `stop_grace_period` (String) Time to wait before force-stopping.
- `stop_signal` (String) Signal to stop the container.
- `sysctls` (Map of String) Sysctl settings.
- `tmpfs` (List of String) Tmpfs mounts.
- `tty` (Boolean) Allocate pseudo-TTY (docker run -t).
- `user` (String) User to run as (user:group).
- `volumes` (List of String) Volume mounts (host:container or named:container).
- `working_dir` (String) Working directory inside the container.


<a id="nestedblock--config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `config`

Required:

- `file` (String) Path to the config file.
- `name` (String) Config name.


<a id="nestedblock--network"></a>
### Nested Schema for `network`

Required:

- `name` (String) Network name.

Optional:

- `attachable` (Boolean) Allow manual container attachment.
- `driver` (String) Network driver (bridge, overlay, host, none).
- `driver_opts` (Map of String) Driver-specific options.
- `external` (Boolean) Use externally created network.
- `internal` (Boolean) Restrict external access.
- `ipam_driver` (String) IPAM driver.
- `ipam_gateway` (String) IPAM gateway (e.g. '172.28.0.1').
- `ipam_subnet` (String) IPAM subnet (e.g. '172.28.0.0/16').
- `labels` (Map of String) Network labels.


<a id="nestedblock--secret"></a>
### Nested Schema for `secret`

Required:

- `file` (String, Sensitive) Path to the secret file.
- `name` (String) Secret name.


<a id="nestedblock--volume"></a>
### Nested Schema for `volume`

Required:

- `name` (String) Volume name.

Optional:

- `driver` (String) Volume driver.
- `driver_opts` (Map of String) Driver-specific options.
- `external` (Boolean) Use externally created volume.
- `labels` (Map of String) Volume labels.


<a id="nestedatt--container"></a>
### Nested Schema for `container`

Read-Only:

- `container_id` (String)
- `container_name` (String)
- `exit_code` (Number)
- `health` (String)
- `image` (String)
- `ip_address` (String)
- `network_settings` (List of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedobjatt--container--network_settings))
- `ports` (List of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedobjatt--container--ports))
- `service` (String)
- `state` (String)

<a id="nestedobjatt--container--network_settings"></a>
### Nested Schema for `container.network_settings`

Read-Only:

- `gateway` (String)
- `ip_address` (String)
- `mac_address` (String)
- `name` (String)


<a id="nestedobjatt--container--ports"></a>
### Nested Schema for `container.ports`

Read-Only:

- `ip` (String)
- `private_port` (Number)
- `protocol` (String)
- `public_port` (Number)
